nasb.text: And the sons of Israel were sorry for their brother Benjamin and said, “One tribe is cut off from Israel today.

esv.text: And the people of Israel had compassion for Benjamin their brother and said, “One tribe is cut off from Israel this day.

cnv.text: 以色列人為他們的兄弟便雅憫難過，說：“今天以色列中有一個支派被剪除了。

ccb.text: 以色列人为他们的同胞便雅悯人难过，说：“如今以色列绝了一个支派。
